retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the put operation is not the primary purpose; retry after failure would indicate a double-put (use-after-free).

judge.reason: Primary purpose is file release cleanup (freeing private data, buffers, flushing pages). The refcount decrement via btrfs_free_extent_state is one of several resource-releasing steps, not the dominant or only purpose.
